name: Cartoon Bricks Vip
description: Relax your brain and play the best bricks breaker game this year. Touch and shoot balls to break all bricks. You must clear all bricks to finish each level. Find the best aim angle to break a maximum of bricks. The bricks are destroyed when their score reach 0. Break the bricks before they hit the bottom of the screen. Cartoon Bricks is a addictive and challenging brick game. Just play it to relax your brain. Be focus on breaking bricks and you will find it more funny and exciting. Features - Easy to play - Colorful glow skins. - Easy game controls with one finger. - Thousands of stages! Endless game mode. - More props to get more fun!
instructions: How to play - Hold the screen with your finger and move to aim - Find best positions and angles to hit all bricks - When the durability of brick reaches 0 destroyed - Never let bricks reach the bottom or game is over - The ball flies to wherever you
tags: 1 Player, 2D, Action, Arcade, Ball, Block, Bricks, Cartoon, Casual, Classic, endless, Fun, Highscore, Mobile
